stats.label: of organizations hit by supply chain attacks in 2025

updates.title: NSOC launch updates
updates.body: Use this section for announcements, student opportunities, research milestones, and event recaps.

people.name: Prof. Justin Cappos
people.bio: The "father of software supply chain security." Creator of TUF, Uptane, gittuf, in-toto, and Git's security architecture, technologies deployed in millions of vehicles and across critical global infrastructure.

people.name: Prof. Jiahao Yu
people.bio: Cyber-AI expert focused on AI-driven vulnerability discovery, fuzzing, and automated patch generation. His team won a $3M prize in the DARPA AI Cyber Challenge (AIxCC).

people.name: Andrew Nesbitt
people.bio: Founder of ecosyste.ms. One of the foremost researchers performing security data analysis at open-source scale, with deep expertise in large-scale ecosystem intelligence and AI-powered cybersecurity tooling.
